title: Knock knees - NHS
text:
velopment, and it usually gets better as they get older.
But in some children and adults it may be caused by something else, such as:
an injury to the knees or legs osteomyelitis (a bone infection) arthritis vitamin D deficiency some genetic conditions which affect the joints such as joint hypermobility syndrome or Ehlers-Danlos syndromes 
Page last reviewed: 12 January 2023
Next review due: 12 January 2026
